Body.Content:
Loop workspaces will soon support multiple owners, allowing end-users to promote members to owners in the membership user experience for shared Loop workspaces.

This message is associated with Microsoft 365 Roadmap ID 362124

When this will happen:

General Availability (Worldwide): We will begin rolling out mid-December 2024 and expect to complete by late January 2025.

How this will affect your organization:

Once available, Loop workspaces will support multiple owners, allowing end-users to promote members to owners in the membership user experience for shared Loop workspaces.

What you need to do to prepare:

There is nothing you need to do to prepare. These changes will roll to your tenant automatically.

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: Loop workspaces will soon allow multiple owners, enabling users to promote members to owners. This feature will start rolling out in mid-December 2024 and is expected to be fully available by late January 2025. No action is required to prepare for this update.

message.Title: Microsoft Loop – Promote Members to Owners in Loop workspaces

Body.Content:
Updated December 19, 2024: We have updated the rollout timeline below. Thank you for your patience.

Loop workspaces will soon support multiple owners, allowing end-users to promote members to owners in the membership user experience for shared Loop workspaces.

This message is associated with Microsoft 365 Roadmap ID 362124

When this will happen:

General Availability (Worldwide): We will begin rolling out mid-January 2025 (previously mid-December) and expect to complete by late February 2025 (previously late January).

How this will affect your organization:

Once available, Loop workspaces will support multiple owners, allowing end-users to promote members to owners in the membership user experience for shared Loop workspaces.

What you need to do to prepare:

There is nothing you need to do to prepare. These changes will roll to your tenant automatically.

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: Microsoft Loop will soon allow promoting members to owners in shared workspaces. The rollout, starting mid-January 2025 and ending late February 2025, requires no action for preparation. This update is detailed in Microsoft 365 Roadmap ID 362124.

Loop workspaces will soon support multiple owners, allowing end-users to promote members to owners in the membership user experience for shared Loop workspaces.

How this will affect your organization:

Once available, Loop workspaces will support multiple owners, allowing end-users to promote members to owners in the membership user experience for shared Loop workspaces.

What you need to do to prepare:

There is nothing you need to do to prepare. These changes will roll to your tenant automatically.
